title: taeniandra micrantha
intro: Taeniandra micrantha is a species of flowering plant in the family Diapensiaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Taeniandra micrantha include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. Herbal preparations of Taeniandra micrantha include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
